{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Adepts
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Adepts]] are individuals proficient in their world's energy system.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
